title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: A design pattern for multi-agent systems that minimizes LLM calls by using deterministic code where appropriate. The Race Condition system runs 1000 agents planning marathon routes using the Spine and Sprout algorithm instead of LLM-based planning, reducing token costs and improving latency. The before_model_callback mechanism allows agents to bypass the model when logic is better served by code.
